CheckTitle: Security group restricts Redis access from the internet
Description: Checks that Redis TCP port 6379 is not exposed to unrestricted IPv4 (`0.0.0.0/0`) or IPv6 (`::/0`) sources.
Risk: Public Redis access can permit unauthorized reads, writes, destructive commands, and remote exploitation.

Code.CLI:
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 6379/6379 --SourceCidrIp 0.0.0.0/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 6379/6379 --Ipv6SourceCidrIp ::/0
Code.Other: Restrict Redis ingress for both `SourceCidrIp` and `Ipv6SourceCidrIp` to application hosts or trusted CIDRs.

Recommendation.Text: Do not expose TCP port 6379 to `0.0.0.0/0` or `::/0`.
